@AGENTS.md

## Tailwind class reference (auto-generated from @theme in app/globals.css)

Components must reference these tokens — never literal hex, px, or font-weight values.

- Type: `text-display`, `text-section`, `text-body`, `text-label`, `text-meta`, `text-axis`
- Line-height: `leading-display`, `leading-body`, `leading-tight`
- Weight: `font-regular`, `font-medium` (no `font-bold` or `font-semibold` — DESIGN.md only allows 400/500)
- Radius: `rounded-card`, `rounded-control`, `rounded-pill`, `rounded-full`
- Color (background): `bg-page`, `bg-surface`, `bg-surface-subtle`, `bg-success-bg`, `bg-danger-bg`
- Color (text): `text-text`, `text-muted`, `text-faint`, `text-success`, `text-success-fg`, `text-danger`, `text-danger-fg`, `text-warning`
- Color (border): `border-border`, `border-border-strong`
- Spacing/sizing: `px-card-x` (14px) and `py-card-y` (12px) for Card padding, `h-ci-bar` (22px) for the CI bar, `min-h-report-grid` (520px) for the results two-column row baseline

Default pairings: `text-body leading-body`, `text-display leading-display font-medium`. Sentence case in all UI copy — no ALL CAPS or Title Case.
